_provenance: Hand-authored DST fixture. US spring-forward 2026: clocks jump from 02:00 EST to 03:00 EDT on 2026-03-08 (second Sunday in March). This fixture verifies that at 09:30 EDT on 2026-03-09 (the first post-DST weekday), market_state is 'open'. Uses zoneinfo 'America/New_York' which handles DST transitions correctly. The UTC offset changes from -5 (EST) to -4 (EDT) at the transition.
